full_text:
Acme Corp Data Retention Policy
1. Introduction
This policy defines how Acme Corp classifies, retains, and disposes of company records. It applies to all employees, contractors, and systems that create or store company data.
2. Scope
This policy covers structured and unstructured records held in company systems, including customer records, email logs, and financial statements. Personal devices are out of scope.
3. Retention Requirements
Each data category below has a minimum retention period and a designated owner responsible for enforcement and disposal.
4. Appendix: Exceptions
Records subject to active legal hold are retained until the hold is released, regardless of the periods listed above.
notes: Native text layer in both formats; no OCR should be triggered.
